label: Improved
items: Pl@ntNet's plant identification now shows up as its own clickable tile in the "Which of these looks correct?" list, sitting alongside the AI candidates with a small Pl@ntNet badge. Useful when Pl@ntNet and Rhozly AI disagree — you can pick either one to save to your Shed.
AI candidates now carry a small "Rhozly AI" badge for the same reason, so the source of each suggestion is obvious at a glance.
When Pl@ntNet is highly confident and its match already appears in the AI candidate list, the tile is suppressed so you don't see the same plant twice.
